label: Charge Credit Card
description: Validates a credit card and returns a mock transaction ID.

business.summary: Validates the credit card number, type (VISA/MasterCard only), and expiration date. Returns a UUID v4 as a mock transaction ID. No real payment processor is contacted.
rules: Card number must pass simple-card-validator validation
Only VISA and MasterCard accepted; AMEX and others rejected
Successful charge returns UUID v4 as transaction_id
preconditions: Valid ChargeRequest with amount and credit card info
